<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Use a Conventional Commit type in the PR title: feat / fix / docs / refactor / test / chore / ci / build / perf -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s`
- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD) and `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` is clean; code is `gofumpt`-formatted
- [ ] Docs/ADRs updated if behavior or a decision changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
